description: Refactor requirement SRS-6 in the SRS document. Currently, SRS-6 is a composite requirement: 'The system shall encrypt all sensitive user data stored locally using AES-256 encryption, and it shall transmit all data to the backend server using TLS 1.3 or higher.' Split this into two separate requirements: an updated SRS-6 stating 'The system shall encrypt all sensitive user data stored locally using AES-256 encryption.' and a new requirement immediately following it stating 'The system shall transmit all data to the backend server using TLS 1.3 or higher.'

metadata.part1_text: encrypt all sensitive user data stored locally using AES-256 encryption
metadata.part2_text: transmit all data to the backend server using TLS 1.3 or higher
